---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Courses

**Introduction to Data (DATA 1010)**  
Tulane University  
[Syllabus](files/syllabus-data-1010.pdf)

**How AI Works**  
Tulane University  
[Syllabus](files/syllabus-how-ai-works.pdf)

**Practical Machine Learning**  
Tulane University  
[Syllabus](files/syllabus-practical-ml.pdf) | [Lab Materials](https://github.com/jlevendi/practical-ml-labs)
